title: verbascum glomerulosum
intro: Verbascum glomerulosum, also known as sticky mullein, is a biennial herbaceous plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Verbascum glomerulosum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
